title: AI Adoption Requires Operational Discipline and Measurable ...
full_text:
Microsoft's quiet withdrawal off Claude Code usage due to rising costs, and Uber reportedly burning through its AI budget early, highlight an important reality: AI doesn't scale without operational discipline.
Microsoft's quiet withdrawal off Claude Code usage due to rising costs, and Uber reportedly burning through its AI budget early, highlight an important reality: AI doesn't scale without operational discipline.
Days of experimentation are long gone. Enterprises seek business impact and real outcomes and they do not have unlimited budgets. This was the mistake pure agilist also made when agile was first introduced.
The companies that win with AI will not necessarily be the ones spending the most. They’ll be the ones that:
-tie AI initiatives to measurable business impact
-build governance and cost visibility into their AI operations
-optimize workflows, not just prompts
-combine human expertise with AI intelligently
-create sustainable operating models for scale
At 10Pearls, we believe successful AI adoption is about measurable business outcomes, governance, optimization, and sustainable execution.
#AI #GenerativeAI #EnterpriseAI #DigitalTransformation #AINative #AIEngineering #BusinessTransformation #10Pearls
